title: Manage horses for stock work
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage horses for stock work demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Manage horse condition and health

pcs.text: Develop and implement workplace procedures for maintaining health and welfare of horses in consultation with workplace staff
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and implement workplace procedures for maintaining health and welfare of horses in consultation with workplace staff?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and implement workplace procedures for maintaining health and welfare of horses in consultation with workplace staff.

pcs.text: Assess, report and document soundness and working condition of horses in the workplace
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess, report and document soundness and working condition of horses in the workplace?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess, report and document soundness and working condition of horses in the workplace.

pcs.text: Ensure proper selection, use and maintenance of personal protective equipment (PPE)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure proper selection, use and maintenance of personal protective equipment (PPE)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure proper selection, use and maintenance of personal protective equipment (PPE).

pcs.text: Identify unsound or unhealthy horses and diagnose or establish reasons for their condition and seek veterinary advice where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify unsound or unhealthy horses and diagnose or establish reasons for their condition and seek veterinary advice where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify unsound or unhealthy horses and diagnose or establish reasons for their condition and seek veterinary advice where required.

pcs.text: Administer treatment and implement management plan for unsound or unhealthy horses under supervisor or veterinary supervision, according to management plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Administer treatment and implement management plan for unsound or unhealthy horses under supervisor or veterinary supervision, according to management plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Administer treatment and implement management plan for unsound or unhealthy horses under supervisor or veterinary supervision, according to management plan.

pcs.text: Record horse identification, treatments administered and management plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record horse identification, treatments administered and management plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record horse identification, treatments administered and management plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Manage horse condition and health

elements.title: Manage nutritional requirements of horses

pcs.text: Develop and implement feeding plans for workplace horses, taking into account daily and seasonal factors affecting nutritional requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and implement feeding plans for workplace horses, taking into account daily and seasonal factors affecting nutritional requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and implement feeding plans for workplace horses, taking into account daily and seasonal factors affecting nutritional requirements.

pcs.text: Provide supplementary feeding programs for workplace horses to ensure they are in optimum physical condition and health for stock work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide supplementary feeding programs for workplace horses to ensure they are in optimum physical condition and health for stock work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide supplementary feeding programs for workplace horses to ensure they are in optimum physical condition and health for stock work.

pcs.text: Identify potential nutritional problems and take preventative or corrective action through the use or withdrawal of supplementary feeding
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential nutritional problems and take preventative or corrective action through the use or withdrawal of supplementary feeding?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential nutritional problems and take preventative or corrective action through the use or withdrawal of supplementary feeding.

pcs.text: Develop and implement work programs for workplace horses according to their condition and nutritional status
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and implement work programs for workplace horses according to their condition and nutritional status?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and implement work programs for workplace horses according to their condition and nutritional status.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Manage nutritional requirements of horses

elements.title: Supervise activities and tasks requiring the use of horses

pcs.text: Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks while working with horses according to workplace health and safety procedures and biosecurity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks while working with horses according to workplace health and safety procedures and biosecurity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks while working with horses according to workplace health and safety procedures and biosecurity.

pcs.text: Match horses to rider according to ability and suitability for tasks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Match horses to rider according to ability and suitability for tasks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Match horses to rider according to ability and suitability for tasks.

pcs.text: Schedule and communicate tasks to staff
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Schedule and communicate tasks to staff?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Schedule and communicate tasks to staff.

pcs.text: Coordinate and supervise tasks according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Coordinate and supervise tasks according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Coordinate and supervise tasks according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Coordinate education of horses by contractors or staff, and provide supervision to ensure that horses and personnel work according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Coordinate education of horses by contractors or staff, and provide supervision to ensure that horses and personnel work according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Coordinate education of horses by contractors or staff, and provide supervision to ensure that horses and personnel work according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Organise stock training for inexperienced horses by a horse trainer
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Organise stock training for inexperienced horses by a horse trainer?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Organise stock training for inexperienced horses by a horse trainer.

pcs.text: Maintain respectful communication with workplace staff and contractors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain respectful communication with workplace staff and contractors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain respectful communication with workplace staff and contractors.

pcs.text: Monitor and record outcomes of activities and tasks according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and record outcomes of activities and tasks according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and record outcomes of activities and tasks according to workplace requirements.
